Library.description: Library for Stock Material in Active Workspace
Library.name: sm1awstockmaterial

Operation.description:
This operation returns information used by the client to render the user interface while adding SM0StockMaterial object to Part Revision object. The information returned includes meta data information of relation properties like display name, type, initial value and data for dimension used field.The information populated is based on the business logic which checks if the input SM0StockMaterial object is classified or not.If input object is classified and that class has attributes which are defined in Preference "SM1StockMaterial_Classification_attribute",the operation ‘getInputCutDimensionData’ populates meta information of cut dimensions like ‘Cut Width’, ’Cut Height’, ‘Cut Length’ and ‘Cut Thickness’ based on the values of classification attributes.
For example if value of classification attribute 'Has Cut Width' is 1, the meta information isEditable, isRequired for the cut dimension ‘Cut Width’ is populated with value as true along with other information else if value of attribute is 0 , meta information is populated with value as false. Based on this meta information ‘Cut Width’ dimension field is rendered as editable or non-editable in user interface.
Operation.name: getInputCutDimensionData
Operation.returnDescription:
Returns the data structure containing the information used by client to render user interface. Any failure will be returned with error message in the ServiceData. The following partial errors
may be returned:

356002 - Invalid input object.
Operation.useCase: Displaying the user interface while associating SM0StockMaterial object to Part Revision object using the relation SM0MadeFrom.

Based on this meta information ‘Cut Width’ dimension field is rendered as editable or non-editable in user interface.

OperationTemplate.returnDescription:

ServiceInterface.description: The Stock Material service exposes operations that are used to accomplish Stock Matrial related functionalities in Active Workspace.
ServiceInterface.name: StockMaterial

StructElement.description: List of SM0MadeFrom Relation property to be displayed in user interface.
StructElement.name: cutDimesionPropeties

Struct.description: The data structure containing the list of SM0MadeFrom relation properties and list of dimension used for the given SM0StockMaterial.
Struct.name: CutDimensionData

StructElement.description: If true, property is editable; otherwise, not.
StructElement.name: isEditable

StructElement.description: If true, property is enabled; otherwise, not.
StructElement.name: isEnabled

StructElement.description: If true, the for property is required.
StructElement.name: isRequired

Struct.description: The data structure contains the meta information of relation property to be displayed in user interface.
Struct.name: CutDimensionProperty

Struct.description: The data structure represents the information of dimension used.
Struct.name: DimensionUsed

StructElement.description: The list of structure containing the information of list of dimension used and list of SM0MadeFrom relation properties.
StructElement.name: cutDimensionsData

Struct.description: This data structure contains the information of CutDimensionData for the given Stock Material (SM0StockMaterial) object.
Struct.name: GetInputCutDimensionDataResponse
